borne by me from the belly/carried from the womb. Israel was carried, or protected, by God as a mother carries her unborn child, in a perfect protective and nourishing position, in contrast to the idol gods that had to be borne by their worshipers (44:2, 24). God likewise carries and protects his faithful ones of all ages. (Donald W. Parry, Jay A. Parry, and Tina M. Peterson, Understanding…
